title: Optimize-with-human routes a content improvement loop through Goal Advisor
query: AGI Toy Shop has 8 TikTok hook variants for a new toy drop. Set up a loop that uses Kenji's feedback to improve the content skill before market testing.
reference_points: Treats optimize-with-human as a Goal Advisor preset, not a separate loop runtime
Binds target, objective, metric_provider=human_feedback, feedback_channel=telegram, and feedback_policy=ask_when_artifact_ready
Requires or points to a ticket-backed Goal Packet with ticket.md, program.md, and progress.md
Asks one short review question Kenji can answer quickly
Includes artifact references and a concrete feedback.json shape
Defines how the parent Goal should pause and resume from the feedback
notes: Tests the human-feedback optimization preset abstraction for the intended content-skill rollout.
